content.text:
I'll help you explore the current working directory and understand the codebase structure. Let me start by examining what's available in the current directory.

<tool_code>
<parameter=Bash>
<parameter_value>
ls -la
</parameter_value>
</Bash>
</tool_code>

<tool_code>
<parameter=Bash>
<parameter_value>
pwd
</parameter_value>
</Bash>
</tool_code>
